title: Lego just unveiled a 1,500-piece X-Files set, complete with Mulder, Scully and a grey alien - Engadget
summary: Lego just announced a nifty-looking X-Files set. The company has also created a smaller set that recreates Scully's lab, complete with a minifigure of the agent in a lab coat.
caption: output/2026-07-21/lego-just-unveiled-a-1-500-piece-x-files-set-complete-with-mulder-scul.txt
